sentences.arabic: مَرِضَ الطِّفْلُ يُوسُفُ وَبَقِيَ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Mali Jusuf se razbolio i ostao je kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The child Yusuf got sick and stayed at home.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ حَرَارَتُهُ مُرْتَفِعَةً وَلَمْ يَأْكُلْ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Imao je visoku temperaturu i nije puno jeo.
sentences.translationEn: He had a high temperature and did not eat much.

sentences.translation: Majka ga je odvela kod pedijatra.
sentences.translationEn: His mother took him to the children's doctor.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الطَّبِيبُ إِنَّهُ مَصَابٌ بِنَزْلَةِ بَرْدٍ بَسِيطَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar je rekao da ima jednostavnu prehladu.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor said he has a simple cold.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ عَادَ يُوسُفُ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon tri dana Jusuf se vratio u školu.
sentences.translationEn: After three days Yusuf returned to school.
